title: Metronidazole
body_html:
Metronidazole is effective against protozoa and anaerobic bacteria. It causes a disulfram-like reaction when taken with alcohol. It can be adminstered rectally and can be used as part of triple therapy for H pylori infection.
3
4059
Pharmacology
Antimicrobials
Metronidazole is effective against protozoa and anaerobic bacteria. It causes a disulfram-like reaction when taken with alcohol. It can be adminstered rectally and can be used as part of triple therapy for H pylori infection.




Additional Content

Metronidazole is a type of antibiotic that works by forming reactive cytotoxic metabolites inside the bacteria.

Adverse effects
  • disulfiram-like reaction with alcohol
